projects.name: AgentVision X
projects.description: AI Agent Observability Dashboard that visualizes the internal pipeline of a Gemini LLM query in real-time.
projects.long_description: AgentVision X is an advanced AI observability platform that breaks down a Gemini LLM query into 7 distinct pipeline stages — parsing, retrieval, reasoning, generation, validation, and more — and streams the progress to the frontend over WebSockets. It provides deep transparency into how AI agents process and respond to queries, with per-step latency tracking, token cost analysis, and an interactive execution graph.
projects.problem_statement: Lack of transparency in how LLMs process queries makes debugging and optimization difficult for developers.
projects.solution: A real-time observability dashboard that visualizes every stage of an LLM pipeline, tracks performance metrics, and allows step-by-step replay and failure injection.
features: 7-stage LLM pipeline visualization (parsing, retrieval, reasoning, generation, validation)
Real-time WebSocket streaming of pipeline progress
Prompt, completion, and thinking token tracking
Timeline scrubber to replay past runs
Step inspector for inputs and outputs
Failure injection mode to re-run individual steps
projects.architecture: Client-server architecture with React frontend, FastAPI backend, WebSocket streaming for real-time updates, and Gemini API integration for LLM pipeline execution.
future_scope: Persistent run history with database storage
challenges_faced: Designing a generalized 7-stage pipeline abstraction for LLM queries
Handling real-time streaming with WebSockets efficiently

projects.name: Anvesync
projects.description: Full-stack workforce management platform with employee records, attendance tracking, leave management, and admin analytics.
projects.long_description: Anvesync is a production-grade HR and workforce management platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. It supports multiple roles (admin, manager, employee) with role-based access control backed by Prisma and a relational database. Features include location-aware check-in/check-out attendance, leave request workflows, employee record management, and rich admin analytics dashboards.
projects.problem_statement: Organizations need a unified platform to manage employee records, attendance, and leave workflows with role-based access.
projects.solution: A full-stack HR platform with RBAC, location-aware attendance, leave management, and analytics, all built on a modern Next.js + Prisma stack.
features: Reusable UI components for tables, filters, and charts
Next.js API routes for auth, attendance, leaves, and reporting
projects.architecture: Full-stack Next.js application with API routes, Prisma ORM connected to a relational database (PostgreSQL), RBAC middleware, and Tailwind CSS UI.
learning_outcomes: Next.js API routes and full-stack patterns
challenges_faced: Designing a flexible RBAC system for multiple role types

projects.name: Xrepo
projects.description: Open-source collaborative platform for developing, sharing, and iterating on quantum algorithms. FOSS Hackathon Winner.
projects.long_description: Xrepo is a web-based quantum circuit playground and collaborative repository built for the FOSS Hackathon, where it won 1st place out of 50+ teams. It provides a visual quantum circuit designer with real-time multi-user collaboration, a versioned repository system tailored to quantum circuits, and an integrated Gemini-powered learning assistant and documentation generator.
projects.problem_statement: Quantum computing lacks accessible, collaborative tools for learning, developing, and sharing quantum algorithms.
projects.solution: An open-source web platform combining a visual quantum circuit designer, real-time collaboration, version control, and an AI-powered learning assistant.
features: In-app learning assistant for quantum computing
projects.architecture: React frontend with Node.js/Express backend, MongoDB for circuit storage and versioning, Firebase for real-time collaboration, and Gemini API for AI features.
learning_outcomes: Firebase Firestore for live data sync
challenges_faced: Designing a versioning system for non-traditional quantum circuit data

projects.name: GateCraft
projects.description: Interactive playground for learning and experimenting with digital logic gates. Select a gate, toggle inputs, and see the output in real time.
projects.long_description: GateCraft is an educational web application that provides an interactive environment for learning digital logic gates. Users can select any logic gate (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR), toggle inputs, and instantly see the output. It integrates Gemini 2.5 AI to explain gate behavior and logic concepts in an accessible way.
projects.problem_statement: Learning digital logic gates is often abstract and textbook-heavy, making it hard for students to develop intuition.
projects.solution: An interactive, visual logic gate playground with AI-assisted explanations to make digital logic tangible and engaging.
features: Interactive logic gate selection (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR)
Real-time input toggling and output visualization
Educational content for each gate type
projects.architecture: React + TypeScript SPA with Tailwind CSS styling and Gemini API for AI explanations.
challenges_faced: Making gate logic intuitive through visual design

projects.name: PDF Designer
projects.description: The ultimate free online PDF tool for all your needs — create, edit, and export PDF documents from the browser.
projects.long_description: PDF Designer is a browser-based PDF creation and editing tool that allows users to design professional PDF documents without any software installation. It features a rich text editor, template management, and multiple export options, all built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
projects.problem_statement: Most PDF tools require paid software or desktop applications, limiting accessibility.
projects.solution: A free, browser-based PDF tool that enables creation, editing, and export of professional PDFs directly in the browser.
projects.architecture: Client-side only web application using browser APIs for PDF generation.
challenges_faced: Implementing PDF rendering in the browser without server-side dependencies

projects.name: Harx Portfolio
projects.description: Personal portfolio website showcasing projects, achievements, and technical skills, built with React and Tailwind CSS.
projects.long_description: Harx is a fully responsive personal portfolio website built with React.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and EmailJS. It showcases projects, experience, achievements, skills, and a contact form with email delivery integration.
projects.problem_statement: A developer needs a professional online presence to showcase their work and make it easy for recruiters and collaborators to reach them.
projects.solution: A modern, animated, fully responsive portfolio website with project showcase, achievements gallery, and a working contact form.
projects.architecture: React SPA with Vite build tool, Tailwind CSS for styling, Framer Motion for animations, and EmailJS for contact form.
future_scope: Add AI chatbot powered by RAG
